node.text: Maria had a great experience hiking with her church friends last weekend, feeling surrounded by supportive people and enjoying nature.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "hiking church friends") on Session 25 (Score: 0.98)

node.text: Maria wanted to make connections, laugh together, and take in nature's beauty during the hike.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "hiking church friends") on Session 25 (Score: 0.98)

node.text: Maria plans to explore more and volunteer at shelters next month.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "hiking church friends") on Session 25 (Score: 0.98)

node.text: Maria has gone camping a few times but has never tried mountain climbing.
Maria believes in pushing boundaries for growth and self-exploration.
Maria believes that moments like the shared photo bring peace and appreciation for life.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "hiking church friends") on Session 16 (Score: 0.54)

node.text: Maria and her family went on a road trip to Oregon when she was younger.
Maria went camping with friends from church to take her mind off things.
Maria finds working with passionate people like John motivating.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "hiking church friends") on Session 16 (Score: 0.54)

node.text: Maria described a view of a waterfall and bridge as awesome and breath-taking.
